meta_description: AI-powered restaurant website builder. Create a website with menu, reservations, and gallery in 5 minutes. No coders or designers needed.
og_description: Create a restaurant website in the Promto builder — AI design, menu, booking, and SEO for your venue.
hero_subtitle: Create a professional restaurant website without programmers and designers.

advantages.description: Everything for restaurant business: online menu, table reservations, and specials.

how_it_works.title: Select Venue Type
how_it_works.description: Specify what's open — restaurant, cafe, bar, or food delivery.

how_it_works.title: Launch AI
how_it_works.description: AI will generate structure, texts, and design — with menu and booking.

how_it_works.title: Customize Details
how_it_works.description: Add dish photos, prices, and publish — website is ready to welcome guests.

faq.question: How is Promto different from regular website builders?
faq.answer: Promto uses AI for content generation — you don't need to create texts and design manually. Describe the restaurant and get a ready website.

faq.question: Can I make a menu with prices in the builder?
faq.answer: Yes, the builder has ready-made blocks for menus with dish descriptions, photos, and prices.

faq.question: Is the builder suitable for a restaurant chain?
faq.answer: Yes, you can create separate websites for each venue or a multi-restaurant platform.

faq.question: Do I need a programmer for setup?
faq.answer: No, the builder is fully visual — any user without technical knowledge can manage it.

faq.question: How will the website look on mobile devices?
faq.answer: All websites are responsive — they automatically adapt to smartphone or tablet screen size.

faq.question: How much does the builder cost?
faq.answer: Start for free. Paid plans unlock additional features and the ability to connect your own domain.

cta_mid_title: Create a Website in the Promto Builder
cta_mid_subtitle: AI builder does all the work — from design to content population.
cta_final_title: Your Restaurant Deserves the Best Website
